problem id: f3cdeb29
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(3)

examples:
  00000001 -> 11110101
  00100111 -> 10001001
  00000100 -> 11010111
  00010110 -> 01100011
  10010000 -> 01011110
  10011000 -> 00001110
  11001001 -> 00100111
  10100000 -> 10111110

query: 10111101
predicted answer: 01101110
